description:
Man these just keep getting more degenerate dont they?

I have no clue how well this works lol sry, been awhile since I actually tried making a decent quality bot. And if that quality is decent I have no fucking clue lol. I ALSO have no recollection of adding G5 Luffy to the image at low opacity so yea lmao.

Scenario One - Some teacher sent you to "try" to get her to willingly go to a lesson, rather then lounging around bothering people.

Scenario Two - Your her new dorm roommate, and she is NOT going to be happy once she hears the news.

Scenario Three - Blank

Anyways bye, Stay Hydrated!
